ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* European (EU) size */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Australian (AU) size range */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* United States (US) size range */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* United Kingdom (UK) size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of footwear (e.g., men, women, children) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "footwear_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion entry */,
  "inner_sole_length_cm" REAL /* Inner sole length in centimeters */,
  "inner_sole_length_in" REAL /* Inner sole length in inches */,
  "boot_length_cm" REAL /* Boot length in centimeters */,
  "boot_length_in" REAL /* Boot length in inches */,
  "inner_sole_width_cm" REAL /* Inner sole width in centimeters */,
  "inner_sole_width_in" REAL /* Inner sole width in inches */,
  "boot_width_cm" REAL /* Boot width in centimeters */,
  "boot_width_in" REAL /* Boot width in inches */,
  "boot_opening_cm" REAL /* Boot opening in centimeters */,
  "boot_opening_in" REAL /* Boot opening in inches */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of footwear (e.g., men, women, children) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "foot_type" TEXT /* Type of foot (e.g., wide, narrow, standard) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_footwear_measurements_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used in the region (e.g., EU, AU, US, UK) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size conversion entry
Type of footwear (e.g., men, women, children)
Unique identifier for each measurement entry
Reference to the size conversion entry
Type of footwear (e.g., men, women, children)
Type of foot (e.g., wide, narrow, standard)
Size standard used in the region (e.g., EU, AU, US, UK)
Primary language used in the region
